creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Torsten Zühlsdorff from comment #2)
Torsten,

Are you updating to the latest version as well?  After seeing http://arstechnica.com/security/2015/10/joomla-bug-puts-millions-of-websites-at-risk-of-remote-takeover-hacks/ and having a look at the Joomla situation in ports we are a bit behind on updates.
